biological_replicate: developed Saccharomyces cerevisiae strains that express each as their sole source of actin.
technical_replicate: Three technical replicates were carried out on the same plate.
experimental_design: the ability of both β- and γ-actin to support yeast growth.
factor_value: the ability of both β- and γ-actin to support yeast growth.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
